game_text: Look at Blue Team hand. Choose one Asset card and reveal it.
flavor_text: Public information became pressure.
learning_note: Hacktivists often use open-source information to identify targets and narratives.

game_text: Blue Team discards 1 card unless they control SOC Analyst or Network Monitoring.
flavor_text: The hashtag moved faster than the help desk.
learning_note: Public pressure can distract response teams during real incidents.

game_text: Disable one Operator until Blue Team next turn unless Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The message looked urgent enough to click.
learning_note: Phishing can delay operations and compromise staff accounts.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to SCADA Web Interface Email Server or Operator Laptop. MFA reduces this by 2.
flavor_text: Old passwords found new doors.
learning_note: Credential reuse can expose remote access email and business systems.

game_text: If RTU/PLC Gateway or Access Point is active deal 2 damage to it unless Password Reset is active.
flavor_text: The easiest guess was never changed.
learning_note: Default credentials are a common weakness in exposed devices.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to SCADA Web Interface or Email Server. If successful Blue Team loses 1 SCP.
flavor_text: The front page became the protest sign.
learning_note: Defacement may signal deeper access or create public trust issues.

game_text: If Billing Database is damaged Blue Team loses 2 SCP. Otherwise deal 1 damage to Billing Database.
flavor_text: The warning arrived before the proof.
learning_note: Leak threats create pressure even when full impact is not proven.

game_text: Draw 1 card. If Public Records Dump is in discard draw 2 then discard 1.
flavor_text: A crowd can map a target quickly.
learning_note: Distributed research can speed up target discovery.

game_text: Return Public Records Dump or Data Leak Threat from discard to hand.
flavor_text: The link spread before anyone verified it.
learning_note: Paste sites and public posts can amplify disruption.

game_text: The next Recon card costs 1 less and cannot be canceled by Port Closure.
flavor_text: Attribution blurred at the edge.
learning_note: Anonymization makes source blocking and attribution harder.

game_text: Your next Network Attack costs 1 less. IDS reduces its damage by 1 less.
flavor_text: The trail crossed too many exits.
learning_note: Proxies complicate investigation and response.

game_text: Look at the top 3 Blue Team cards. If one is Port 443 or Modbus reveal it and draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The scan found the first chapter.
learning_note: Scanning identifies exposed services and possible entry points.

game_text: Deal 3 damage to Email Server or SCADA Web Interface. Enterprise Firewall reduces this by 2.
flavor_text: The crowd became the outage.
learning_note: Availability pressure can disrupt public-facing services.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to RTU/PLC or Pump Station. OT Engineer reduces this by 1.
flavor_text: The playbook was copied not understood.
learning_note: Public technical details can be misused against poorly protected systems.

game_text: Disable IDS or Water Quality Monitor until Blue Team next turn.
flavor_text: Too many alarms made the real one quiet.
learning_note: Alert fatigue can cause teams to miss important signals.

game_text: Deal 2 damage to Operator Laptop. MFA or Password Reset reduces this by 2.
flavor_text: One reused password was enough to start.
learning_note: Remote access should be protected by MFA monitoring and strong credentials.

game_text: Disable Email Server until Blue Team next turn unless Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The inbox drowned the incident.
learning_note: Email disruption can slow coordination during response.

game_text: Deal 3 damage to SCADA Web Interface or Billing Database. MFA reduces this by 2.
flavor_text: The vendor account opened a side door.
learning_note: Third-party credentials can create serious access-control risk.

game_text: Choose one Infrastructure Asset. Blue Team reveals whether Backup or OT Engineer is in hand.
flavor_text: The rumor was enough to force a check.
learning_note: Unverified claims still consume response time and resources.

game_text: If Water Tower or Treatment Plant is damaged Blue Team loses 1 additional SCP.
flavor_text: The board room became part of the battlefield.
learning_note: Operational incidents often create public communication challenges.

game_text: Once per turn reduce the cost of an Attack by 1 if Blue Team has damaged an Asset this game.
flavor_text: Coordination turned noise into pressure.
learning_note: Attacker coordination can increase campaign speed and consistency.

game_text: When you play a Recon card draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
flavor_text: The post made the campaign visible.
learning_note: Public channels can coordinate pressure and recruit attention.

game_text: Website Flood Threat deals plus 1 damage.
flavor_text: The crowd automated itself.
learning_note: Botnets and volunteer tooling can increase availability pressure.

game_text: Recon cards cost 1 less once per turn.
flavor_text: The forum turned anger into a plan.
learning_note: Leadership and coordination are force multipliers for hacktivist activity.

game_text: Credential Stuffing and Leaked Vendor Credential deal plus 1 damage once per game.
flavor_text: The list had a price and a purpose.
learning_note: Credential markets increase risk from password reuse.

game_text: If Blue Team loses SCP this turn draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The story became part of the attack.
learning_note: Public impact can be part of the adversary objective.

game_text: Provides 1 Internet resource.
flavor_text: The outside path was enough to begin.
learning_note: Internet resources represent public-facing access and reach.

game_text: Provides 1 Network resource.
flavor_text: A route became a foothold.
learning_note: Network resources represent internal positioning and service reachability.

game_text: Provides 1 Application resource.
flavor_text: The login page became a target.
learning_note: Application resources represent web API and account attack paths.

game_text: Provides 1 Endpoint resource.
flavor_text: The workstation became the weak point.
learning_note: Endpoint resources represent user devices and workstation access.

game_text: Provides 1 Infrastructure resource.
flavor_text: The process network entered the story.
learning_note: Infrastructure resources represent OT and utility operation paths.
